en: I'm sorry you and Angie broke up, but are you going to sit here sulking or are you going to call her?
ko: 너랑 Angie가 헤어져서 안됐는데, 여기 앉아서 삐져 있을 거야 아니면 전화할 거야?

en: I'm not calling her, guys.
Why not?
Because if I was her, I wouldn't take me back either.
ko: 내가 걔라도 나를 다시 받아주지 않을 거니까.

en: I was really a jerk to her.
I was selfish, and I was too afraid to be vulnerable, and lost her.
ko: 이기적이었고, 솔직해지는 게 너무 무서워서 걔를 잃었어.

en: John, that was beautiful.
Just tell her that.
Yeah, man. She would really appreciate hearing that.
Just give her a call, buddy.
Tell her what you told us.
Hello?
Hey, Angie. It's me.
Yeah, it's John.
F you!
What?
F you! No!
Why are you saying that? What am I doing, dude? I'm freaking out.
ko: 왜 그런 말을 해? 나 뭐 하는 거야?

en: Say what you said earlier! Say something else! The be vulnerable thing. Go!
Go f yourself! No!
Oh no, I never liked you in the first place, girly.
What did she say? You got to bail me out.
You want me to talk to her? Bail me out. Talk to her.
ko: 내가 대신 말해줄까? 나 좀 구해줘. 말해줘.

en: Talk to her. Tell her I'm sorry. Please.
Hi, Angie? Hey, sorry, I don't know what's going on.
F you! No! Oh my God.
F you, loser! No!
You mind doing it too? Yes, I hate all of what you're working with.
ko: 너도 해볼래? 네가 가진 거 전부 싫어.

en: Don't! What is going on? Get off the phone!
ko: 그러지 마! 이게 무슨 일이야? 전화 끊어!

en: Angie, I don't know what's going on with those guys.
ko: 앤지, 저 녀석들이 왜 그러는지 모르겠어.

en: I love you.
F you!
Come on, man. It's my ex-girlfriend. Give me the phone.
ko: 야, 내 전 여친이잖아. 전화 줘.

en: Angie, it's me.
Um, I'm really sorry.
Oh dude, it's on mute. Oh, oops.
F you, dude! Why are you so off today?
Angie!
She hung up on me.
Wow. Are you serious? Very mature.
Blew it again with the love of my life.
Yeah, blew it with my last girlfriend too, by getting my penis stuck in her toilet.
ko: 응, 전 여친한테도 말아먹었어, 걔네 변기에 그걸 끼워서.

en: Just like I blew it with Stevie.
Every time we had sex, I'd say, "Aichi wah wah."
She did not like that.
But Angie wasn't like your ugly girlfriend.
ko: 근데 앤지는 네 못생긴 여친 같은 애가 아니었어.

en: She was as warm as a summer night.
As sweet as a song.
She was— Oh my God, she's on her way up!
You motherf***er! Angie! No, no, no! Angie! Angie!
ko: 이 나쁜 놈! 앤지! 아니, 아니, 아니! 앤지! 앤지!

en: Angie!
